[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0010001 2
2 0010000 1
3 0111001 4
4 1010001 3
5 1010100 3
6 1110011 5
7 0010100 2

01 10 0010001 2 match 1
12 21 0111001 4 match 3
23 32 1111001 5
34 43 1010101 4
45 54 1110111 6
56 65 1110111 6
67 76 1110101 5
70 07 1110101 5

13 31 1010001 3 match 4
24 42 1111101 6
35 53 1110011 5 match 6
46 64 1010100 3 match 5
57 75 1110111 6
60 06 0010101 3
71 17 1110101 5

36 63 1010101 4
47 74 1110101 5
50 05 1110011 5 match 6
61 16 0010100 2 match 7
72 27 1111101 6

15 51 1110011 5 match 6
26 62 0111101 5
37 73 1110101 5
